news-global-econ.title: Maine Democrats reject Platner-backed candidate in blow to scandal-plagued Senate hopeful
news-global-econ.description: Hannah Pingree, the former speaker of the Maine House of Representatives, wins Maine's 2026 Democratic gubernatorial primary, defeating Troy Jackson and a crowded field of challengers.

news-global-econ.title: SEN PETER WELCH: Trump is leading us into another unnecessary war. This time it’s Cuba
news-global-econ.description: Instead of starting an unnecessary war with Cuba, the U.S. should negotiate a deal ending the failed embargo and promoting investment in our neighbor.

news-global-econ.title: Cotton: Aspects of Iran Deal Are 'Step in the Wrong Direction'
news-global-econ.description:
Thursday, during an appearance on Fox News, Sen. Tom Cotton (R-AR) expressed his concerns about the framework of a deal between the United States and Iran to cease hostilities.

news-global-econ.title: Republican congressman will end months-long absence from DC after missing 135 roll call votes
news-global-econ.description: Rep. Tom Kean Jr. is set to return to Capitol Hill on June 30 after more than 100 days away due to an undisclosed health issue, his spokesperson confirmed.

news-korea-soc.title: Ukraine is advancing. Now is the perfect time for Trump to strengthen NATO
news-korea-soc.description: Trump administration shows signs of a positive shift on Ukraine as Zelenskyy meets Trump at G7 and battlefield gains bolster Kyiv's momentum.

news-korea-soc.title: Drone intercepted over Team Korea World Cup training camp ahead of game against Mexico
news-korea-soc.description: Mexican military intercepted a drone flying over South Korea's training camp ahead of their World Cup Group A match, prompting a security response.

news-global-soc.title: Iranian and Israeli athletes react to memorandum of understanding to end US-Iran war
news-global-soc.description: Former Iranian wrestler Sardar Pashei and Israeli Olympian AJ Edelman criticize the U.S.-Iran deal, calling it a dangerous lifeline for the regime.

news-global-soc.title: Tax cut pulls global bond funds to India, backing rupee
news-global-soc.description: Overseas flows into index-eligible bonds have increased by ₹32,630 crore ($3.5 billion) since the June 5 reforms, according to latest available Clearing Corp of India data

news-global-soc.title: Short-bond rally faces risks from cash drain, analysts say
news-global-soc.description: DBS Bank Ltd. expects the central bank to deploy a stronger tool in August by requiring banks to keep a larger proportion of deposits with the RBI

news-global-soc.title: Trump Seeks Ceasefire on All Fronts as Israel Holds Ground in Lebanon
news-global-soc.description:
President Donald Trump on Thursday renewed his call for peace across the Middle East, urging all parties to uphold ongoing negotiations as Israel moved to deepen its military presence inside southern Lebanon.
